name: ui-regression-pinner fires PostToolUse when commit diff touches an app router path under app or pages folder
command: mkdir -p repo/app && (cd repo && git init -q) && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/agents/ui-regression-pinner-trigger.sh" --root repo --diff-stub touched=app/login/page.tsx --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'pinner_fires=true' out.txt && grep -q 'matched_path=app/login/page.tsx' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
